auth.email_already_exists: A user with this email already exists.
auth.email_not_verified: Email address is not verified. Please check your inbox.
auth.account_inactive: Your account is deactivated. Please contact support.
auth.invalid_or_expired_token: The link is invalid or has expired.
auth.registration_success: Registration successful. Please check your email.
auth.email_verified: Email address verified. You can now log in.
auth.reset_email_sent: If the account exists, a reset link has been sent to your email.
auth.unauthorized: You are not logged in. Please log in.
auth.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
auth.venue_blocked: Your venue has been deactivated. Please contact the platform administrator.
auth.blacklisted: Your account is blacklisted. Please contact support.

validation.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.password_too_weak: Password must contain uppercase letters, lowercase letters, and numbers.
validation.first_name_too_short: First name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.last_name_too_short: Last name must be at least 2 characters.

email.verification_body: Click the button below to verify your email address and activate your account.
email.verification_footer: This link is valid for 24 hours. If you did not create an account on Rezz.ba, you can ignore this email.
email.manager_invitation_subject: You've been invited as a manager – {{venueName}}
email.manager_invitation_body: You have been invited to become a manager of {{venueName}} on the Rezz.ba platform.
email.manager_invitation_footer: This invitation is valid for 7 days. If you were not expecting this email, you can ignore it.
email.worker_invitation_subject: You've been invited as a worker – {{venueName}}
email.worker_invitation_body: You have been invited to become a worker at {{venueName}} on the Rezz.ba platform.
email.worker_invitation_footer: This invitation is valid for 7 days.
email.reservation_cancelled_subject: Your reservation has been cancelled – Rezz.ba
email.reservation_cancelled_body: Unfortunately, your reservation at {{venueName}} for {{date}} at {{time}} has been cancelled.
email.reservation_cancelled_footer: If you have any questions, please contact the venue directly.

venue.name_already_exists: A venue with this name already exists.
venue.invitation_already_accepted: This invitation has already been accepted.
venue.invitation_already_declined: This invitation has already been declined.

reservation.cannot_reject: Reservation cannot be rejected at this status.
reservation.cannot_cancel: Reservation cannot be cancelled at this status.
reservation.no_available_tables: No available tables for the selected date, time and table type.
reservation.venue_inactive: This venue is not active and does not accept reservations.
reservation.invalid_date: Reservation date cannot be in the past.
reservation.table_type_not_available: Selected table type is not available at this venue.
reservation.already_rated: This reservation has already been rated.
reservation.not_completed: Only completed reservations can be rated.
reservation.manager_cancelled: Reservation was cancelled by the manager.
reservation.rating_only_completed: You can only rate completed reservations.
reservation.no_show_auto_rated: Guest was automatically rated 0 for not showing up.
reservation.blacklisted_after_no_shows: Guest has been blacklisted after 3 no-shows.

employee.already_exists: A user with this email is already an employee at this venue.
employee.invitation_pending: An invitation for this user is already pending.
employee.cannot_remove_self: You cannot remove your own account.
employee.cannot_remove_owner: You cannot remove the venue owner.
employee.cannot_change_own_role: You cannot change your own role.

event.already_past: You cannot create an event in the past.

general.internal_error: An error occurred. Please try again.
general.not_found: The requested resource was not found.
general.too_many_requests: Too many requests. Please try again in a few minutes.
